name: Fighter
description: Whether it is a job or simply an apt description, done out of need or wanderlust, or with desired outcome being riches, glory or simple survival there are many who claim this title in these trying days.
classBonus: Choose one of your starting weapon trainings and gain a +1 to ATK with that type permanently

progression.description: Strike a target with your melee weapon dealing a HDR.
Restore 1D4 HP and cure the Staggered status effect to yourself or a target within melee range.
If your first strike in a battle is made with a ranged weapon gain advantage on the ATK roll.
Gain +2 to all Martial Maneuver rolls (both your attempts and your resistance rolls when being targeted by them).

Strike a target using a weapon ATK dealing standard DMG. If this ATK is not resisted (aside from ARM value) you and your allies gain +1 ATK for 2 rounds (effect can stack x3 each time resetting the duration).
Select a second weapon type to gain a permanent +1 ATK with as if you are selecting your Class Bonus again.

Dash towards a target within your MOVE range (even if you have already taken a Movement Action this turn) running them down with your weapon poised. Deals your equipped melee weapons DMG and knocks target back 1 tile.
Strike a target using a weapon ATK and lower your target's Stamina by 1 pt. and knocking them back 1 tile.
If you have successfully used both a melee and ranged weapon during a single battle gain +1 EVA and MOVE for the remainder of said encounter.
Gain 2 "Striker Dice" which are 1D6 dice that can be added to any melee strike's ATK or DMG roll. These dice reset after any rest action is taken.

Call out to your battlefield compatriots with rousing words and tactical advice. Restores 1D4 HP and grants advantage to their next ATK roll or a HDR to their next spellcast (effects all allied units and yourself).
Gain the ability to dual-wield any pair of one-handed weapons without penalty (one ATK roll is made which takes only your Main Action dealing both weapon's DMG rolls if the strike hits).
Strike a target with your melee weapon ignoring their ARM and resistances entirely.

At the beginning of your turn you can designate 1 ally to be buffed with +1 EVA. Your target ally can be swapped at the beginning of any of your subsequent turns as well to adapt to changes in the current battle (can not target self).
Gain an additional Armament Slot.

name: Mage
description: Magic is an extreme and unforgiving force in this world, both toward those it is being unleashed upon and to its wielder. Through dedicated research and with the favor of the gods one can use a fraction of this power to manifest their will.
classBonus: Start with access to a school of magic of your choosing: Pyromancy, Ocean's Call Arcana, Great Storm Arts, Arcadian Arts, Twin Moon Arts, or Phantasm Arts

progression.description: Fire a bolt of magic energy toward a target within 3+INT tiles that deals 1D6+INT Force DMG.
Gain an additional +1 to Spell Memory.
Conjure a barrier around yourself that grants level 1 resistance to fire, water, ice, electric, or toxic DMG for 1+INT rounds.
Gain an additional +1 when Charge Boosting a spell (spending a STAM pt. to increase your spellcasting roll).
Add +1 DMG (of the spell's specified DMG type) to offensive spells that are fully cast on the turn they are attempted.
Gain +4 Max HP.
(must choose to activate only after being missed by an attack) Teleport yourself within 3 tiles of your original position after evading or blocking at attack.
Cast a destructive bolt that deals 1D6 (fire, ice, electric, or toxic) DMG to a target within 5 tiles (element is chosen before the spellcasting roll is made).
Gain access to a new standard-tier weapon or armor training of your choice (without having to spend your Training pts. to do so).
Cast a protective incantation that flatly mitigates 6 DMG regardless of type/element the next time you are hit by an attack.
Increase the threshold your targets must roll to succeed on saves made due to your spells by 2 pts.
Gain +1 temporary ARM & BAR when charging a spell.
Gain access to the next level of your first chosen school of magic of the Mage Class (from Novice to Advanced, or from Advanced to Master).
Gain access to a new Novice-level school of magic of your choice.
You no longer need a channeling item to cast spells if desired.

name: Pilgrim
description: The given name for one that travels the world in search of divine knowledge and abominations to pit their strength against. Typical pilgrim-warriors excel using blunt weaponry, an array of armor, and both offensive and support magics.
classBonus: Begin knowing the Ghostwhisper and Celestial languages.

progression.description: Gain access to Novice-level spells from the Twin Moon Arts school of magic.
Use your main action to cleanse an allied unit of a status effect or debuff and inflict them upon yourself (including their duration, additional effects, etc.). Can be used from any range.
Block actions rolled to defend against undead or monster enemy ATKs are made with a bonus 1D4 (both shield or weapon blocks apply).
Gain the novice level Twin Moon spell "Healing Mote" as a core spell regardless of if you even have access to this school of magic.
Gain the Medic Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels.
All attacks, spells, and skills from undead enemies deal 1 less DMG to you regardless of DMG type, weakness, etc.
Summon a magical counter-rune that makes all undead and monster type enemies roll their spellcasting rolls as a LDR for 1+VIT rounds.
Boost the HP recovered (not STAM) when taking a rest by +3 for you and all party members.
Perform a weapon ATK: this ATK gains advantage and deals a bonus 1D6 DMG (of your weapon's DMG type) when used against any non-apparition undead targets.
Summon a font of lunar energy on a free space up to 8 tiles away. Your Twin Moon Arts can be cast from this 'Lunar Well' instead of from the caster's current position. Lunar Well lasts 2+VIT rounds.
When restoring HP with a spell add your VIT value to the amount healed.

Call upon the divine power of the Twin Moons to grant you strength against the undead. All weapon ATKs made against Undead enemies land without fail for 1+VIT rounds even if the target is an Apparition-type undead.
Gain the ability to swap the type of all light-element spells to dark and vice-versa. This can be in regards to DMG type, elemental resistance, etc.
Boost your and your ally's Fate rolls (made upon having HP reduced to 0) by +1D4 as long as you are in the party.
You no longer need a channeling item to cast spells if desired.

name: Provisioner
description: Having someone on your side that can identify the value of usable materials and that also knows what to do with them can be the difference between surviving the wilds and a swift death.
classBonus: Gain the Chef Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels. Additionally, start your character with 100 SV regardless of your other starting items.

progression.description: Gain the Alchemist Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels.
Gain the Armorer Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels.
Add +2D4 on all Barter checks.
Survey checks made while traversing the overworld gain +3 if you are the party leader.
Grant tools and shields you repair a temporary +1 to durability (effect can not stack).

Make a Search (INT) check to survey a room. Regardless of your roll, unless it is a critical failure, gain knowledge of nearby valuables (valued at "Rare" or higher). Otherwise, this is a normal Search check.
Spend a Stamina point to re-roll a failed / undesirable camp action once per camping phase.

When gathering materials via surveying the overworld, mining, foraging, scavenging, or looting defeated enemies and a Critical 20 is rolled gain an additional material/item from the relevant gathering pool.
You immediately can determine the value of any item you or your party members acquire.
You have learned how to perfectly pack as much equipment as possible on your person. Gain +4 encumbrance.
You may swap a piece of equipment onto your perso or into your armament slots once per battle as a free action instead of a main action.
Gain access to a new standard-tier weapon or armor training of your choice (without having to spend your Training pts. to do so).
Roll all Luck checks made to find drops after defeating enemy units with advantage.
Successful uses of your pickaxes and shovels no longer use up a point of durability.
Spend 500 Silver at any town / settlement to hire adventurers to pass on their knowledge: Gain 1 Merit Point for you and your party members.

name: Scout
description: Information gathering and reconnaissance is the backbone to any well-planned operation-- this holds even truer in uncharted territory. Good scouts and spies provide such a backbone in times like these.
classBonus: Gain the Analyst Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels and begin knowing the Midnight Code language.

progression.description: Gain the Lockpick Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels.
Gain advantage on "Keep Watch" and "Reconnaissance" actions made while at camp.

Become hidden to all nearby units / units on the battlefield. Can only be used if out of enemy sight lines, on a tile that provides cover, or if other units are blinded/distracted in some way. Using a Main Action ends this effect; If an ATK is made to end this effect it gains advantage.

Gain advantage on climbing checks made when scaling man-made structures. Additionally, actions like opening/closing windows, man-made doors or gates are now totally silent and do not require a stealth / FNS check.
When traversing the overworld (regardless of traversal style chosen) +1 is added to your movement range rolls.
Add a permanent +2 to all of your Initiative rolls. If your teams Initiative is ever rolled with disadvantage you roll normally.
Strike the target with an unarmed melee ATK that deals no DMG but inflicts the sleep status effect. This ability can not be used on undead, construct, or flora creatures.
Take a second Movement Action adding 1D4 to your MOVE stat and ignoring the rules of being Locked-Up (including opportunity ATKs) when doing so.
Select an enemy unit that is in sight (not obscured by smoke, invisible, etc.): You and all allied units gain +1 ATK and DMG against this target. This effect lasts 2+CHA rounds.
Gain the Trapper Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels and advantage on Search checks made to spot them.
You no longer suffer impeded MOVE or EVA from standing on / passive through water tiles, oil tiles, foliage tiles, or uneven terrain tiles.

Before an allied unit is about to strike an enemy in melee perform a ranged weapon ATK (if they are in range). If this ATK connects the target's EVA is lowered by 1. Your DMG roll is also made with a LDR.
Suffer 1 less MOVE penalty when moving to a higher elevation (even if this reduces the penalty to 0) and gain a bonus +1 to ranged DMG rolls when striking from an elevated place.
Gain +2 EVA during battles where monster, insectoid, or flora-type enemies are present. Once this buff is activated it remains so for the rest of combat even if said enemy types are defeated.
Grant yourself one ATK that has a guaranteed hit chance once per battle (1D20 may still be rolled to see if you critically strike your target).
There will be a package waiting on you the first time you enter a settlement (per adventure) that contains a Healing Powder, Salted Meat, Lockpick, and Rope per player in your party.

While at camp (overworld only) gain the option to use your camp action to call a traveling merchant with a small stock of basic wares and supplies. This will allow the party to offload unwanted gear weighing them down and possibly replenish supplies.
When crafting a weapon with a subtype (bone, meteorite, dragon, etc.) lower the cost of its main material by 1.
Sell items at around 75% of their true value instead of the usual 50% without the need for an initial CHA check.

name: Myrmidon
statBonuses: Gain +5 HP Max upon choosing this class
classBonus: Gain the ability to deflect one melee strike causing it to deal no DMG or inflict any other effects to you. This can be done once per battle.

progression.description: Upon missing an ATK you may add your SPD value to your roll . If the ATK would land with this new total you may deal half DMG (rounded down) towards your target.

You can now gain up to 3 "Control Points" for evading (+1), fully blocking, or parrying (+2). These points to can spent to boost your/an ally's or lowering an enemy's current ATK roll (must be called before the roll) equal to as many Control Pts. as you wish to apply.
You may perform a block action with an equipped shield as a reaction to an allied unit being targeted. Ally must be within 3 tiles; You receive any DMG / effects inflicted instead of your ally.

(can be activated as an instant action. Must be at less than max HP.) Enter a rage state in which you deal an additional 1D6 direct DMG when dealing any other DMG. If this skill is still active at the end of your turn lower your STAM by another point; This skill only deactivates when STAM would be lost if an ATK is not attempted during your turn.
You can now spend Control Points to increase your/an ally's MOVE during a movement action or to increase a block roll made with a weapon or shield item.
Perform a shield bash that DMG scales with your STR stat and does not lower your shield's durability.
Select one of any enemy type: gain +2 to ATK and DMG rolls made toward that enemy type whenever you are pitted against them.
Gain every melee weapon training you do not already know.
Regain HP equal to the number of enemy units on the field at the beginning of a battle after initiative is rolled. Boss enemies grant 2 HP.
Gain an additional movement or main action after successfully defeating an enemy unit with a weapon ATK or ability.
You can now gain up to 5 Control Points.
Strike the target with your equipped melee weapon dealing a LDR. If you are damaged by an ATK made by your target on their next turn immediately make an ATK roll that, if it hits, deals a HDR.
Strike your target with an equipped weapon (ranged or melee) dealing a LDR, then flip a coin: if heads, your target's currently equipped weapon breaks.

name: Rogue
classBonus: Gain the Pilferer Talent regardless of your current Attribute values. In addition, you are always to be informed by the DM if a target has a pilferable item.

progression.description: Gain the Pilferer Talent regardless of your current Attribute levels.
You no longer can be targeted by opportunity strikes as long as you are not currently afflicted with a status effect or debuff.
Gain access to the next level of the Twin Moon Arts (from Novice to Advanced, or from Advanced to Master).
Gain access to novice level Pyromancy.

Upon dealing DMG to an undead or monster target gain a 'Wrathful Blessing' point. Upon reaching 7 of these points you may restore 7 HP or 1 STAM to yourself or an ally. This blessing can be applied at any point during your turn as a free action and can be stored as long as desired. Points reset upon applying blessing effect.
Gain access to the next level of the Twin Moon Arts (from Novice to Advanced, or from Advanced to Master).

name: Wizard
classBonus: Learn the Trovan Rune language if you do not already know it. If your base spellcasting die is less than 1D8, make it so.

progression.description: Your area-of-effect / linear range / all-targeting spells no longer harm or affect allied units (unless you choose for them to do so).
Gain advantage on all Arcana checks.

Conjure a massive, warping field of magic that deals 1D4 force DMG to all enemy units on the field. Field can be maintained every round dealing DMG again without a re-cast on your turn as long as you do not take DMG, move, or perform another action.
Gain access to the Enchanter talent regardless of your current attribute levels. Additionally, gain access to advanced level enchantment options.
Gain access to a new Novice-level school of magic of your choice.
Increase your base Spellcasting Die by 1 DT.

Instantly transport you and your allies back to the overworld or to the last visited settlement that has an active Conveyance Circle for magical travel (DM will provide this information if possible). This spell costs 5 STAM to perform and cannot be cast during combat.
Gain access to the next level of any of your chosen schools of magic of the Mage Class (from Novice to Advanced, or from Advanced to Master).
Using an alchemical ingredient from your inventory cast a healing spell on yourself or an ally within melee range that restores 1D4 HP per Ingredient Level of the used item.
Gain the ability to perform any enchantment regardless of the required school of magic (enchantment level still applies).
Gain the ability to perform advanced-level enchantments.

name: Ranger
classBonus: Gain an additional +1 EVA when utilizing cover tiles,

progression.description: You can now perform ranged ATKs while locked up with an enemy unit but only towards the unit(s) you are locked up with.
Strike the target with your equipped melee weapon. This strike reveals your target's weak point; If this strike is made towards an already-known weak point deal an additional 5 direct DMG.
Any traps set by you deal 1D6 direct DMG in addition to its other effect(s). Units that have tripped one of your traps also take 1D4 more DMG for ranged weapons for 1 battle / rest.
(Used only before the first round of combat) Increase your and your allies' Initiative rolls by 3 at the outset of a battle.

Wreathe your equipped weapon / an ally's equipped weapon within 3 tiles in a charge of energy that adds 1D4 DMG for 1+INT rounds. The DMG type can be the fire, ice, water, electric, wind, or toxic element; This desicion is permenant and is celected upon taking this skill. (Element: ______________)

Wreathe your equipped weapon / an ally's equipped weapon within 3 tiles in a charge of energy that adds 1D4 DMG for 1+INT rounds. The DMG type can be the fire, ice, water, electric, wind, or toxic element; This desicion is permenant and is celected upon taking this skill. (Element: ______________)

Wreathe your equipped weapon / an ally's equipped weapon within 3 tiles in a charge of energy that adds 1D4 DMG for 1+INT rounds. The DMG type can be the fire, ice, water, electric, wind, or toxic element; This desicion is permenant and is celected upon taking this skill. (Element: ______________)

Wreathe your equipped weapon / an ally's equipped weapon within 3 tiles in a charge of energy that adds 1D4 DMG for 1+INT rounds. The DMG type can be the fire, ice, water, electric, wind, or toxic element; This desicion is permenant and is celected upon taking this skill. (Element: ______________)

Wreathe your equipped weapon / an ally's equipped weapon within 3 tiles in a charge of energy that adds 1D4 DMG for 1+INT rounds. The DMG type can be the fire, ice, water, electric, wind, or toxic element; This desicion is permenant and is celected upon taking this skill. (Element: ______________)
Gain an additional slot on your Toolbelt for consumables / tools / etc.
Gain the Medic Talent regardless of your current Attribute values. Medic HP recovery rolls are increased by 1 DT.
Rolls made to procure food from hunting / fishing / trapping creatures is always considered successful for you and your party/allies.

At the precipice (or first room) of a dungeon investigate the area and learn the main type of enemy the resides within. If there are multiple enemy types the DM will inform you only of the predominant enemy type.

Gain advantage on all climbing checks. You and your party no longer suffer a movement penalty for traversing mountainous terrain on the overworld. Additionally, your party gains +1 vision range while on mountain tiles.

Gain access to Novice-level Arcadian Arts spells; If you already have access to this level of the Arcadian Arts gain the Advanced-level instead. If you already have the Advanced-level you can not take this skill.

Gain 2 special arrows made of energy that replenish after battle. These arrows can not miss their target and deals 1D4+INT pierce DMG (this pierce DMG is considered magical and is rolled against the target's BAR instead of ARM).

Become invisible and therefore completely untargetable except by area DMG. You must be standing on a foliage tile to cast this spell. You can use your MOVE to warp to another foliage tile on the field if desired. This effect ends once a main action is taken.
Gain +1 to your energy arrow quiver's maximum capacity. Permenantly change your energy arrow's DMG type from pierce to fire, water, electric, toxic, or wind.
